name: OpenClaw
summary: OpenClaw Path Traversal in Plugin Installation
description:
Summary

A path traversal issue in OpenClaw plugin installation could allow a malicious plugin package name to escape the intended extensions directory and write files outside of it.

Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: openclaw (npm)
- Affected: >= 2026.1.29-beta.1, < 2026.2.1
- Patched: >= 2026.2.1

Details

When installing plugins, OpenClaw derives an installation directory name from the plugin's package.json name. In affected versions, crafted scoped names could result in path segments like .., which allowed the computed install target to resolve outside the extensions directory.

Exploitation requires the victim to run openclaw plugins install on attacker-controlled plugin content.

Fix

The install path is now validated and reserved/traversal-like plugin ids are rejected.

Mitigation

Upgrade to openclaw >= 2026.2.1.

Thanks @logicx24 for reporting.
suggestion: Upgrade openclaw to >= 2026.2.1 or later. The install path is now validated and reserved/traversal-like plugin ids are rejected. Upgrade to openclaw >= 2026.2.1. Thanks @logicx24 for reporting.
